story.text:
# 📖 ⿻ Act XXX: Ceremony Complete
**act** · shared · narrative · plurality

The ceremony completes. Protection enables exit enables coordination.
> *Protection enables exit enables coordination. The blade, the spell, and the overlap. Five pillars. Seven technologies. Five domains. The window closes. The work begins.*
